SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE TO DECEMBER, 2012. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDEG: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
